summary: Live preflight shows the hinted representative #81723 is already closed, so #92384 is the best surviving canonical issue for the WeChat bare-target direct-vs-group outbound routing root cause. The linked open PR #92995 is related to the canonical issue but is not merge-ready in this plan: merge is blocked by job policy, missing merge preflight, unknown mergeability, one failing check, and ClawSweeper's unresolved proof/test concerns.
